violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC states they have monthly pest control services. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024
Non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer and reach-in freezer have debris. PIC disconnected chest freezer to defrost and clean during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024
